bīnghòu de zúyǐ ràng wǒ zài shàngmiàn zǒulù。
Ice thick enough to make me walk on it.
其实我工作并不多，但足以让我这周在办公室里忙着了。
qíshí wǒ gōngzuò bìngbuduō， dàn zúyǐ ràng wǒ zhèzhōu zài bàngōngshì lǐ máng zhe le。
In fact, I do not work much, but enough to keep me busy this week in the office.
